What we do

Powering innovation with cutting-edge IT services and agile IT models.

ConglomerateIT combines six service pillars with flexible delivery models so enterprises can modernize, build, test, analyze, automate, and scale with the right operating structure.

Talk to an expert Compare delivery models

QA / QE

Quality Assurance & Engineering

Functional testing, functional automation, non-functional testing, and observability for reliable software delivery.

Infrastructure

On-Premises, Cloud & Core Services

Compute, backup, storage, operating systems, network, network security, AWS, Azure, GCP, migration, DDI, Active Directory, and FTP.

Software Development

Web, Backend & Mobile

Custom websites, portals, web applications, APIs, server-side systems, database engineering, and mobile applications.

Business Transformation

Enterprise Platforms

Salesforce, ServiceNow, Workday, and Databricks implementation, customization, integration, and ongoing support.

Data, Digital & Analytics

Data Strategy to Governance

Define, analyze, visualize, engineer, and govern data programs that turn raw information into business intelligence.

AI-First Approach

Intelligent Transformation

IT to AI transformation, AI-native roles, and generative AI programs for enterprise teams.

IT models

Choose the operating model that matches your speed, cost, and control needs.

The original What We Do page lists onshore, nearshore, OCC, GCC, COE, and hybrid delivery. Each model remains visible here, with sharper decision context.

Onshore

  • Local compliance
  • Time zone alignment
  • Cultural compatibility

Nearshore

  • Geographical proximity
  • Time zone compatibility
  • Cost-effective

OCC

  • Global talent access
  • Cost optimization
  • Scalability and flexibility

GCC

  • Centralized operations
  • Cost efficiency
  • Innovation and scalability

COE

  • Best practices
  • Innovation hub
  • Knowledge sharing

Hybrid

  • Flexible and scalable
  • Cost optimization
  • Operational efficiency

Industry alignment

Future-ready technology solutions tailored by sector.

ConglomerateIT supports healthcare, financial services, e-commerce, manufacturing, public sector, technology, telecommunications, and utilities.

Healthcare & Life Sciences

Financial Services & Banking

Retail & E-Commerce

Manufacturing & Supply Chain

Technology & SaaS

Public Sector & Government

Telecommunications

Energy & Utilities

Build your next technology operating model with ConglomerateIT.

Tell us whether you need a service team, global delivery model, GCC, quality program, AI-first roadmap, platform implementation, or a complete transformation pod.

Start the conversation

Transforming businesses with tomorrow's technology, today. Global IT services across 4 countries, 500+ projects, 12 years of experience, and 95% client retention.
